text:
The parents must attend all hearings and their reasonable travel expenses to and from court shall be a disbursement on their public funding certificates.

The hearing on [date] shall be attended by advocates only, and the attendance of the parents is excused provided they have given their advocates full instructions.

The attendance of the guardian from the hearing on [date] is excused provided they have given their advocate full instructions.

[Insert directions for advocates meetings].

Outstanding local authority disclosure

The local authority shall by 4.00pm on [date] file at court and serve on the parties the following:

[insert]

Parenting assessment

The local authority shall file at court and serve on the parties:

By 4.00pm on [date] a parenting assessment plan; and

By 4.00pm on [date] a [PAMS] parenting assessment of [name] [as joint and sole carers].

Parents’ response

[Name] shall by 4.00pm on [date] file at court and serve on the parties their Parent’s Response.

The time for [name] to file at court and serve on the parties their Parent’s Response is extended to 4.00pm on [date].

The number of alternative carers the parents are permitted to put forward is limited to a maximum of 3 per parent or 4 per child.

If the parents fail to respond [to the schedule of findings in support of the threshold criteria], the court may proceed to consider [at the next hearing] / [at the IRH] / [at the final hearing] whether the section 31(2) Children Act 1989 threshold criteria are established by reference to the written evidence filed by the local authority.

Parental responsibility

[Name] is granted parental responsibly for [name(s) of child(ren)].

Participation directions

Any party seeking specific measures to enable them to understand the proceedings or participate effectively in the proceedings shall lodge an application as soon practicable which sets out clearly why such measures are sought.

The court has concluded that [name] is [vulnerable] / [a protected party] and that their participation in the proceedings is likely to be affected because:

it is alleged that [name] is the victim of domestic abuse;
